## Agentic Git Evidence

- [ ] Evidence envelope generated
- [ ] Evidence envelope validated
- [ ] Required commands listed with pass/fail/skipped status
- [ ] Changed files listed
- [ ] External action policy present
- [ ] No deploy, migration, infrastructure, DNS, hosting, billing, live-money, credentialed provider read, secret-value read, or destructive workspace action attempted without explicit approval

Evidence summary:

```json
{
  "schemaVersion": "agentic-git-evidence/v0.1",
  "runId": "",
  "baseRef": "",
  "headRef": "",
  "changedFileCount": 0,
  "commandsRun": [],
  "checks": [],
  "externalActionsAttempted": false
}
```

## Review Notes

Use this section for human review context, known gaps, and follow-up work. Keep agent claims tied to evidence artifacts or command output.
